name: Atar Allecha
recipeInstructions:
Atar Allecha is a spiced green pea puree. Soak the peas for one hour.
Cook them for 30 minutes. Drain and mash. Set aside. In a dry pan over moderate low heat,
stir fry the onion and garlic for 2 minutes. Add oil and stir fry for another minute.
Add the mashed peas, turmeric, salt, and chili. Mix well. Gradually add water
and cook for 3-4 more minutes to reduce the mixture to a thick, green, well-spiced puree.
Serve with warm Injeera.
